name: Pig Rush
short_description: "Pig Rush" is a maze adventure game set in a deep forest. In this game, you guide a brave little wild boar named Argan. Argan will evade traps, defeat enemies, and keep moving forward to find the answers needed to save his tribe.
detailed_description: In the maze adventure game ""Pig Rush,"" you control the little wild boar Argan, evading traps, defeating enemies, and seeking answers to save his tribe. Once you select a direction, the wild boar will keep moving forward without the ability to change direction or stop midway, only halting when it encounters a wall. Help the wild boar avoid mechanisms and traps to find the portal to the next area.
about_the_game: In the maze adventure game ""Pig Rush,"" you control the little wild boar Argan, evading traps, defeating enemies, and seeking answers to save his tribe. Once you select a direction, the wild boar will keep moving forward without the ability to change direction or stop midway, only halting when it encounters a wall. Help the wild boar avoid mechanisms and traps to find the portal to the next area.
supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
